subcodes.first_line: O discerning heart! The threshold of God is the refuge of all worlds, and the sacred threshold of the Lord is the sanctuary and shelter of all humanity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دل آگاه پناه عالمیان درگاه اله است و ملجا و ملاذ آدمیان عتبه مقدسه پروردگار
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @spiritual transformation, @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster
